user_query: I'm planning a company event and I want to incorporate some humor. Fetch me a random programming meme and a chuck joke in English. It would be great if you could also search for some memes related to rockets. Let's make it an unforgettable event!

TaskList.description: Fetch a random programming meme from an online meme API.
Fetch a random chuck joke in English from a joke API.
Search for memes related to rockets from a meme database or API.
